headline: Figure Markets Exchange: limited public contract discovery; platform operates on Provenance Blockchain with one open-source utility contract found

findings.text: Provenance Explorer (explorer.provenance.io) requires JavaScript rendering; direct content-fetching unsuccessful. No name-tag search results obtained.
Figure Markets website (figuremarkets.com) lacks published deployed-contracts documentation page. Disclosures section found but contains only legal/risk documents, no contract addresses.
No audit reports linked in protocol.audit_links (empty in per-protocol context); none discovered on website or via general search.

Figure Markets GitHub organization (github.com/figuremarkets) contains one public repository: group-member-approval-smart-contract (Rust, Apache-2.0). Updated March 4, 2026. No deployment artifacts or contract registries found in repo.
Single chain (Provenance) in protocol.chains; no multi-chain enumeration required.
No factory contracts identified; D6 not applicable.
Zero contract addresses enumerated; role taxonomy not populated.
No addresses discovered to validate against evidence URLs.

rationale.verdict: Grade 'unknown' assigned because the protocol operates a centralized, API-driven digital asset exchange on Provenance Blockchain with minimal public on-chain contract disclosure. The Provenance Explorer (primary authoritative source for all contracts on-chain) cannot be directly fetched due to JavaScript requirement. The single open-source GitHub repository found (group-member-approval-smart-contract) is a utility contract for group membership, not a core protocol contract. Figure Markets publishes no deployed-contracts documentation or contract address list on its website. Without access to block-explorer data or published deployment docs, no core contract addresses can be catalogued. The architecture suggests most trading/lending logic runs off-chain with on-chain settlement, but specific contract addresses remain opaque.

evidence.shows: Figure Markets main website confirms platform is built on Provenance Blockchain; offers crypto exchange, lending (Democratized Prime), and YLDS stablecoin. No deployed contract addresses listed.
Disclosures page lists legal agreements, terms of service, and risk documents. No section for deployed contract addresses or technical documentation.
Blockchain Disclosure page contains generic blockchain risk warnings; no contract addresses or technical details.
Figure Markets GitHub organization verified against www.figuremarkets.com; contains one public repository (group-member-approval-smart-contract) with 0 stars, updated March 2026.

Provenance smart contract catalog lists ~12 production contracts on Provenance Blockchain (Bilateral Exchange, Limit Order Book, USDF, Capital Raise, etc.). No Figure Markets-specific contracts listed in this catalog.
Provenance Explorer homepage requires JavaScript to render; content not fetchable via direct GET.

unknowns: D1: Provenance block-explorer name-tag search blocked—JavaScript rendering required; zero contract addresses recovered via this method
D1-offchain: Figure Markets does not publish an enumeration of deployed contract addresses on its website or in a public developer docs
D2: No deployed_contracts_doc URL identified; website lacks technical contract registry
D3: No audit reports found (audit_links empty in pinned context; no audits discovered via website search)
D4: GitHub repo search yielded only one utility contract (group-member-approval-smart-contract); no deployment scripts, artifact registries, or addresses.json files found in public repos
D6: Factory enumeration skipped—no factories identified

protocol_metadata.about: <cite index="2-1,3-7,8-14,8-15">Figure Markets is a decentralized custody digital asset exchange and marketplace built on Provenance Blockchain, offering self-custody crypto trading with MPC wallet technology, yield-bearing lending pools (Democratized Prime) backed by real-world asset collateral, and YLDS, the first SEC-registered yield-bearing stablecoin.</cite>
